---
title: "How do individuals interact with the police? Validation of a scale of motivational postures toward the police in Spanish"
description: "Validación de una escala de posturas motivacionales hacia la policía en español."
venue: "Peace and Conflict: Journal of Peace Psychology"
tipo: articulo
date: "2025-01-01"
author: "Gerber, M.M., Sáez-Fuentealba, L., Bahamondes, J., Figueiredo, A., Moya, C."
authors: [monica-gerber, luciano-saez-fuentealba, joaquin-bahamondes, ana-figueiredo, cristobal-moya]
reference: "Gerber, M.M., Sáez-Fuentealba, L., Bahamondes, J., Figueiredo, A., & Moya, C. (2025). How do individuals interact with the police? Validation of a scale of motivational postures toward the police in Spanish. *Peace and Conflict: Journal of Peace Psychology*."
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
    body-classes: publicacion-page
---

# How do individuals interact with the police? Validation of a scale of motivational postures toward the police in Spanish

Validación de una escala de posturas motivacionales hacia la policía en español.

**Autores OLES:** [Monica M. Gerber](../equipo/monica-gerber.html), [Luciano Sáez Fuentealba](../equipo/luciano-saez-fuentealba.html), [Joaquín Bahamondes](../equipo/joaquin-bahamondes.html), [Ana Figueiredo](../equipo/ana-figueiredo.html), [Cristóbal Moya](../equipo/cristobal-moya.html)

**Fecha:** 2025.

## Referencia sugerida

Gerber, M.M., Sáez-Fuentealba, L., Bahamondes, J., Figueiredo, A., & Moya, C. (2025). How do individuals interact with the police? Validation of a scale of motivational postures toward the police in Spanish. *Peace and Conflict: Journal of Peace Psychology*.

[← Volver a Publicaciones](index.qmd)
